description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building characterized by a highly regular grid of windows covering all visible facades. The structure is supported by several columns at its base, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The exterior features a repetitive pattern of light blue-tinted glass windows set within a white or light gray frame, creating a modern and uniform look. The roof is flat and appears to have some small mechanical structures or vents visible from above. There is no visible signage or decorative elements, emphasizing a functional and minimalist design. The building's overall style and proportions suggest it is designed for high-density urban environments, likely housing multiple floors of office space.
description: A tall, rectangular office building with a grid of blue-tinted windows and a minimalist, modern facade, supported by columns at the base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the regular grid of windows and the supporting columns at the base, with a flat roof visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same grid window pattern, with the roof's mechanical structures more visible and columns still apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with identical window grid and columns, maintaining the building's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniform window grid and roof details, with columns at the base.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows evenly spaced across all facades.
